title: Thompson & Morgan Doff Lawn Weedkiller Spray Bottle Specially Formulated Ready to Use, 1 x Doff Lawn Weedkiller 1L by Thompson and Morgan, Multicolor
features: PRODUCT INFORMATION: Pack size - 1L. Contains active ingredients Mecoprop-P and Dicamba. Ready to use spray bottle. 1 litre treats up to 50M² of lawn.

LAWN WEED KILLER: Keep the lawn in your garden clean, tidy, and weed-free with this Doff Lawn Weed Killer. This ready to use formula is the perfect solution when controlling the weeds in the garden on the path, and patio.
READY TO USE: No need to dissolve the weedkiller in water before use. This ready to use formulation allows you to use the spray instantly and efficiently.
PROTECTS GRASS: The Doff Lawn Weed Killer has been specially formulated to kill common lawn weeds without damaging the grass.
WHEN TO USE: For the best results use this weedkiller when the weeds are growing from late spring until early autumn. The spray should not be used on new lawns that are less than six months old.
